summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping emphasized progress in U.S.–China trade relations after speaking with President Donald Trump, following reports the U.S. may allow Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) to resume AI chip sales to China. Tesla reported 6,964 new European registrations in October, down 48.5% YoY. U.S. Senators Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.) and Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) called for investigations into Meta (NASDAQ: META) over alleged profits from fraudulent ads.
